Atty. MICHAEL BRUNO, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (tel: 415-986-5900) for Respondent.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER MICHAEL SHEPHERD's Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Decision.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner Michael Shepherd's motion to confirm final arbitration decision is granted (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order signed. Judgment signed.
